final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing technical infographic of a Sony A7 camera, fully exploded-view diagram with all parts labeled.

Style/medium: clean technical illustration, exploded-view engineering diagram style, flat vector with fine linework
Composition: centered exploded isometric or orthographic view, all components spread outward from the camera body with leader lines pointing to each part
Subject: Sony A7 mirrorless camera fully disassembled into individual components — body shell, sensor unit, shutter mechanism, mount ring, battery compartment, viewfinder module, LCD screen, control dials, buttons, circuit boards, lens mount contacts, grip, card slot cover, ports panel
Scene/backdrop: plain white background with no distracting elements
Color palette: neutral light gray for components, dark charcoal for label text and leader lines, subtle blue accent for electronic parts
Text (verbatim): "Sony A7"
Constraints: every visible part must have a labeled name in English; leader lines must be clean and non-overlapping; diagram must remain legible at A3 print size
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, lens included in disassembly, cluttered overlapping labels, decorative gradients, watermark
